title: thalictrum minus var. yamamotoi
intro: Thalictrum minus var. yamamotoi, also known as Japanese meadow rue, is a perennial plant in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae) native to East Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Thalictrum minus var. yamamotoi include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support immune function. Traditional herbal preparations of Japanese meadow rue include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a qualified healthcare practitioner.
